name: Dental Evaluation Codes
description: CDT codes for dental evaluation and examination procedures. Used in annual dental visit (ADV) and preventive dental services measures to identify members who received oral health evaluations.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Oral evaluation for a patient under three years of age and counseling with primary caregiver
Comprehensive oral evaluation — new or established patient
Detailed and extensive oral evaluation — problem focused
Comprehensive periodontal evaluation — new or established patient
